turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Reporting an issue at a rental property ️ “Hi, I'd like to report a damage at my rental

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: property.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, I can help with that. What kind of damage are you seeing in the property?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I see imputation in the bathroom and the floor. Not good smell.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Sounds like you mean there’s some kind of stain or damp area in the bathroom and on the floor, and there’s a bad smell too. Could you tell me exactly where the damage is—inside the bathroom, around the toilet, shower, or somewhere else?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, I say it's heavy. I'm full patient in the bathroom, and now the water outside in my bedroom, then the carpet in the floor, it's mold and not a good smell. Maybe, I think so, it's the shower.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, I understand — sounds like you’ve got a serious leak spreading from the bathroom into the bedroom, and now the carpet is getting moldy. Thanks for explaining that. To help urgently: Is the water still leaking right now, or has it stopped?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Always licking, still licking, when I take a shower, then no stop it.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, so the leak keeps going whenever you shower and doesn’t fully stop after. That helps a lot. When did you first notice this problem starting?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: 1 week ago I realized

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks — about one week ago. That gives us a timeline. To arrange repairs quickly, can you tell me which days or times someone can enter the property to check the leak?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, in the morning I never stay in the house because I study in the morning, but afternoon, after 1.50 p.m. I stay in my house, then you can went all the time.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, afternoons after  p.m. work well — thanks for that. To schedule the repair team, what’s the full address of the property?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes is in the 1/55 Kirra shop

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks. I’ve got 1/55 Kirra…, but I need the full street name and suburb to make sure the repair team goes to the right place. What’s the complete address?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Unit 10

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, Unit 10 — got it. I still need the street name and the suburb to complete the address. What’s the street name where the property is located?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Luci

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks — Luci for the street name. I just need one more detail for the address. What’s the suburb of the property?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Suburb 5

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright — sounds like you might mean something else by “Suburb 5.” I just need the name of the suburb, like “Kirra”, “Coolangatta”, “Burleigh”, etc. What is the suburb called?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Kirra

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks — Kirra. Now the address is almost complete. To finish the report, what’s your best phone number in case the repair team needs to contact you before they arrive?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks for the number. Just one last thing for the repair request — what name should the technicians ask for when they arrive?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Vic

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, Vic — thanks. Would you like me to lodge the repair request now with all these details?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, I’ll get that lodged for you now. Afternoon access after  p.m. is noted, Vic. If you need anything else, just let me know.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Thanks! You can tell me the name the people came here?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, Vic. I can check that for you. Are you asking for the name of the repair company or the individual technician who will come?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright — just to be clear, Vic, you said “yes,” but I need to know which one you mean. Are you asking for the company name or the technician’s name?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Technicians name

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, Vic. The technician assigned is Mark Delaney. How would you like Mark to contact you before he arrives — by call or SMS?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Call please

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, I’ll let Mark know to call you before he arrives. Is there anything he should know about access, like a gate code or where to park?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, he can park behind for my house and inside for the garage

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, got it — he can park behind your house and inside the garage. Is there anything else Mark should be careful about when he enters, like pets or a tricky door lock?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: No

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, no worries. I’ll pass that on. Take care, Vic, and have a good day.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Thanks have a good day

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks Vic. Have a good day too.
